conservative.name: Narcotic Caress
conservative.requirements: You must be engaged with your target, must possess a long poisonous tongue

success.description: Your tongue wraps around the exposed flesh of your target injecting narcotic poisons into their bloodstream. The target suffers 5+ Intelligence damage and gains the Perplexed and Overwhelmed conditions while this card is recharging
As above, and you gain on all attacks against the same target while this card is recharging

chaosStar.description: While this card is recharging, suffer 1 fatigue each time you perform an action

reckless.name: Narcotic Caress
reckless.requirements: You must be engaged with your target, must possess a long poisonous tongue

success.description: Your tongue wraps around the exposed flesh of your target injecting narcotic poisons into their bloodstream. The target suffers 4+ Intelligence damage and gains the Perplexed and Overwhelmed conditions while this card is recharging
As above, and the target draws one card from the insanity deck. If it has the Chaos or Trauma trait, the target suffers the insanity until the end of the encounter

chaosStar.description: While this card is recharging, suffer 1 fatigue each time you perform an action
